name: JAVIER OLIVERA
description: Hello, my name is Javier Olivera. I am a full stack web developer with 2 years of experience building websites and web applications. I have knowledge of and hands-on experience with some of the most widely used technologies, such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, among others. I invite you to keep exploring my portfolio to see the full technology stack I work with and some of the projects I have created.
